title: Peekaboo agency pricing detail — Peek/Grow/Leads tiers
html:
Cleaner re-shot of peekaboo's agency pricing — Peek $100/mo (2 brands, 3,600 data points), Grow $200/mo (5 brands, 9,000), Leads custom — with explicit "Multi-client view / Volume Discounts / Custom Tracking / API Access / White-label" agency feature row. Yahir studying the pricing card a week into the deep-dive.

peekaboo · insight ai · aeo agency · saas pricing ladders · competitor research aeo
